name: Riverside Unified School District
districtFact: Riverside Unified publishes standard school calendars with separate end dates for high school and 7th grade versus elementary and 8th grade, so families should check grade-level notes before planning the last week of school.

about.title: About Riverside Unified School District
about.content: Riverside Unified School District serves TK-12 students and families in Riverside, California. The district calendar is used for school attendance planning, transportation, childcare, vacations, academic schedules, teacher duty days, student-free days, parent-teacher conferences, elementary minimum days, and grade-specific final school days.

about.title: How to Use This RUSD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide first day, last day, holidays, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Recess, Spring Recess, and key staff or non-student days. Confirm site-specific schedules, minimum days, and grade-level end dates with Riverside Unified and your school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Riverside Unified Families
content: Check the final week carefully because high school and 7th grade end one day before elementary and 8th grade in the calendars covered here.
Add elementary minimum days separately because they affect pickup, childcare, and transportation.
Watch parent-teacher conference dates because elementary sites are not in session on the listed conference days.
Use the official RUSD district calendar page for revisions and campus-specific updates.

compareIntro: Compare the Riverside Unified school calendar with other California district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring recess.

districtFaqs.q: Which Riverside Unified calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes Riverside Unified standard school calendar PDFs, including classes begin, grade-level end dates, legal and local holidays, recesses, non-student days, and parent-teacher conference dates.

districtFaqs.q: Does every Riverside Unified grade end on the same day?
districtFaqs.a: No. The calendars covered here list one end date for high school and 7th grade and a later end date for elementary and 8th grade.

districtFaqs.q: Does RUSD list a separate first day for 7th grade?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Each calendar covered here lists a first day for 7th grade before the general classes-begin date.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify Riverside Unified calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Riverside Unified district calendar page and campus announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with RUSD.

customSections.label: Riverside Unified School District Calendar Overview
customSections.content: Riverside Unified School District (RUSD) serves students and families in Riverside, California. This page focuses on the districtwide traditional school calendar, while individual schools may publish additional events, minimum days, athletic schedules, testing windows, or campus-specific notices.

groups.label: How families use this calendar
items: Plan school attendance and transportation around districtwide dates.
Check childcare coverage for non-student days, conferences, and minimum days.
Compare grade-level final school days before scheduling end-of-year travel.
Use campus announcements for school-specific events that are not part of the districtwide calendar.

customSections.label: How We Verify Riverside Unified School District Calendar Dates
customSections.content: MySchoolDates reviews the official Riverside Unified School District calendar publication, compares key academic dates, and checks important changes before publishing this reference page. Families should always confirm last-minute changes directly with Riverside Unified School District.

groups.label: Verification includes
items: Date comparison against the published PDF.
Grade-level end date review for high school, 7th grade, elementary, and 8th grade.

customSections.label: RUSD Calendar Tips
customSections.content: Riverside Unified families should treat the district calendar as the main planning reference, then confirm campus-specific details for minimum days, conferences, athletics, testing, transportation, and grade-level end dates.

groups.label: Before making plans
items: Check whether a date applies districtwide or only to a grade level.
Review elementary minimum days because they can affect pickup and childcare.
Confirm parent-teacher conference dates with your school.
Use official RUSD announcements for emergency or same-day schedule changes.
